heir Google Cost Reduction Project . For those who need it, campus is offering a passthrough pay option for Shared Drives, for storage in 10TB increments. IRIS is making it possible for those in the College of Engineering to obtain storage in smaller

ollege of Engineering to obtain storage in smaller 1TB increments, by handling the purchase of 10TB from campus and recharging accordingly for the smaller amounts. Pass-through costs from campus are based on the current (2023-2024) rate and will be b

ased on the current (2023-2024) rate and will be billed in increments of $144/TB/year. Future rates are subject to change. Billing will be done annually, beginning in November 2024, with no pro-rating for partial years. To request this bDrive Shared

for partial years. To request this bDrive Shared Drive storage from IRIS, please fill out the bDrive Shared Space Purchase Request form . Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service
